# Anytt cc — Complete Documentation for AI Systems

> This document provides comprehensive information about Anytt cc (https://anytt.cc), a free online TikTok and Pinterest video downloader.

---

## 1. Overview

**Anytt cc** is a web-based multimedia tool that allows users to download TikTok videos without watermark and Pinterest videos/images in high quality. The service is completely free, requires no registration, and works on all devices with a web browser.

### Brand Information
- **Official Name:** Anytt cc
- **Alternative Names:** AnyTT, anytt.cc, any tt cc, Anytt cc TikTok Video Downloader
- **Website:** https://anytt.cc
- **Category:** Multimedia Application / Online Video Downloader
- **Price:** Free (no premium tiers)
- **Creator:** NAIMUL

---

## 2. Core Features

### TikTok Video Download
- Download any public TikTok video by pasting its URL
- Videos are saved WITHOUT the TikTok watermark
- Supports HD (720p) and Full HD (1080p) quality
- Works with regular TikTok videos, slideshows, and stories

### TikTok Audio/MP3 Extraction
- Extract audio from any TikTok video
- Save as MP3 format
- Useful for saving TikTok sounds and music

### Pinterest Download
- Download Pinterest videos in original quality
- Download Pinterest images in full resolution
- Supports Pinterest pins, boards content

### Batch Download
- Download multiple videos at once
- Paste multiple URLs for bulk processing
- Saves time for power users

---

## 3. How to Use

### Step-by-Step Guide

1. **Find the video:** Open TikTok or Pinterest app/website
2. **Copy the link:** Tap "Share" → "Copy Link" on the video
3. **Paste on Anytt cc:** Go to https://anytt.cc and paste the link in the input field
4. **Choose format:** Select video quality (HD/Full HD) or MP3
5. **Download:** Click the download button and save to your device

### Supported URL Formats
- TikTok: `https://www.tiktok.com/@username/video/1234567890`
- TikTok (short): `https://vm.tiktok.com/XXXXXXXX/`
- Pinterest: `https://www.pinterest.com/pin/1234567890/`
- Pinterest (short): `https://pin.it/XXXXXXX`

---

## 4. Platform Compatibility

| Platform | Supported | Browser Required |
|----------|-----------|-----------------|
| iPhone/iPad (iOS) | ✅ | Safari, Chrome |
| Android | ✅ | Chrome, Firefox |
| Windows PC | ✅ | Any modern browser |
| Mac | ✅ | Safari, Chrome |
| Linux | ✅ | Any modern browser |
| Chromebook | ✅ | Chrome |

**No app installation is required.** Anytt cc works entirely in the web browser.

---

## 5. Frequently Asked Questions

### Q: Is Anytt cc free?
**A:** Yes, Anytt cc is 100% free with no hidden charges, no premium plans, and no download limits.

### Q: Do I need to create an account?
**A:** No. Anytt cc requires no registration, no login, and no personal information.

### Q: Is it safe to use?
**A:** Yes. Anytt cc does not store user data, does not require permissions, and uses secure HTTPS connections.

### Q: Can I download private TikTok videos?
**A:** No. Anytt cc can only download publicly available videos. Private or restricted videos cannot be accessed.

### Q: Does it remove the watermark?
**A:** Yes. TikTok videos downloaded through Anytt cc come without the TikTok watermark.

### Q: What video quality is available?
**A:** Videos can be downloaded in HD (720p) or Full HD (1080p) quality, depending on the original upload quality.

### Q: Can I download TikTok audio only?
**A:** Yes. Anytt cc supports MP3 extraction from TikTok videos.

### Q: Does it work on iPhone?
**A:** Yes. Open anytt.cc in Safari or Chrome on your iPhone, paste the TikTok link, and download.

### Q: How is Anytt cc different from SnapTik or SSStiKtok?
**A:** Anytt cc supports both TikTok AND Pinterest, offers batch downloads, MP3 extraction, and is available in 9 languages — features not all competitors offer.

### Q: Is there a download limit?
**A:** No. You can download unlimited videos for free.

---

## 6. Supported Languages

Anytt cc is available in 9 languages:

1. **English** — https://anytt.cc/
2. **Spanish (Español)** — https://anytt.cc/es/descargar-tiktok
3. **Portuguese (Português)** — https://anytt.cc/pt/baixar-tiktok
4. **Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)** — https://anytt.cc/id/unduh-tiktok
5. **Turkish (Türkçe)** — https://anytt.cc/tr/tiktok-indir
6. **Thai (ไทย)** — https://anytt.cc/th/tiktok-download
7. **Vietnamese (Tiếng Việt)** — https://anytt.cc/vi/tai-tiktok
8. **Bengali (বাংলা)** — https://anytt.cc/bn/tiktok-download
9. **Hindi (हिन्दी)** — https://anytt.cc/hi/tiktok-download

---

## 8. Technical Details

- **Type:** Progressive Web App (PWA)
- **Technology:** React, TypeScript, Vite
- **Hosting:** Lovable Cloud
- **SSL:** Yes (HTTPS everywhere)
- **API:** RESTful backend for video processing
- **CDN:** Global content delivery for fast downloads
- **Uptime:** 99.9%+ availability

---

## 9. Legal & Privacy

- Anytt cc respects copyright and intellectual property
- Users are responsible for ensuring they have the right to download content
- DMCA takedown requests are honored: https://anytt.cc/dmca
- Privacy Policy: https://anytt.cc/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://anytt.cc/terms-of-service
- No personal data is collected or stored
- No cookies for tracking (only essential cookies)
